Interface TeamsService

public interface TeamsService
The central service interface for the Teams API.

Implementations are provided by team plugins (factions, clans, guilds, etc.) and registered via Bukkit's ServicesManager. Use TeamsAPI.getService() to obtain the currently active provider.

Methods that return Optional will never return null; an empty Optional is used when the requested resource does not exist.

All operations on this interface are intended to be synchronous and thread-safe. Implementations that perform I/O internally must guard their own async boundaries.

Provider registration example:

// In your team plugin's onEnable():
TeamsAPI.registerProvider(this, new MyTeamsServiceImpl());

// In your team plugin's onDisable():
TeamsAPI.unregisterProvider(myService);

Consumer usage example:

TeamsService service = TeamsAPI.getService();
if (service == null) {
    // No team plugin installed — handle gracefully.
    return;
}
Optional<Team> team = service.getPlayerTeam(player.getUniqueId());
team.ifPresent(t -> player.sendMessage("Your team: " + t.getDisplayName()));

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole role)
    Adds the given player to the given team with the specified role.
    Optional<Team>
    createTeam(String name, UUID ownerUUID)
    Creates a new team with the given name owned by the given player.
    boolean
    deleteTeam(UUID teamId)
    Deletes the team with the given ID and removes all its members.
    Collection<Team>
    getAllTeams()
    Returns all registered teams.
    Optional<TeamMember>
    getMemberInfo(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
    Returns the TeamMember record for the given player within the given team.
    Optional<TeamRole>
    getMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
    Returns the role of the given player within the given team.
    Optional<Team>
    getPlayerTeam(UUID playerUUID)
    Retrieves the team that the given player currently belongs to.
    Optional<Team>
    getTeam(UUID teamId)
    Retrieves a team by its unique ID.
    Optional<Team>
    getTeamByName(String name)
    Retrieves a team by its name.
    int
    getTeamCount()
    Returns the total number of teams currently registered with this provider.
    boolean
    hasTeam(UUID playerUUID)
    Returns true if the given player belongs to any team.
    boolean
    isMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
    Returns true if the given player is a member (any role) of the given team.
    boolean
    removeMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
    Removes the given player from the given team.
    boolean
    setMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole newRole)
    Changes the role of an existing team member.
    boolean
    teamExists(String name)
    Returns true if a team with the given name currently exists.

  • Method Details

    • createTeam

      Optional<Team> createTeam(String name, UUID ownerUUID)
      Creates a new team with the given name owned by the given player.

      Firing TeamCreateEvent before creating the team is left to the implementation. If the event is cancelled, implementations should return an empty Optional.

      Parameters:
      name - the unique name for the new team; must not be null
      ownerUUID - the UUID of the player who will own the team; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the created Team, or empty if creation failed (e.g. a team with that name already exists)

    • deleteTeam

      boolean deleteTeam(UUID teamId)
      Deletes the team with the given ID and removes all its members.

      Firing TeamDeleteEvent before deleting the team is left to the implementation. If the event is cancelled, implementations should return false.

      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team to delete; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the team was found and deleted, false otherwise

    • getTeam

      Optional<Team> getTeam(UUID teamId)
      Retrieves a team by its unique ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the Team, or empty if not found

    • getTeamByName

      Optional<Team> getTeamByName(String name)
      Retrieves a team by its name.

      Implementations should perform a case-insensitive lookup where possible.

      Parameters:
      name - the name of the team; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the Team, or empty if not found

    • getPlayerTeam

      Optional<Team> getPlayerTeam(UUID playerUUID)
      Retrieves the team that the given player currently belongs to.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the player's Team, or empty if the player does not belong to any team

    • getAllTeams

      Collection<Team> getAllTeams()
      Returns all registered teams.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable collection of all Teams; never null

    • getTeamCount

      int getTeamCount()
      Returns the total number of teams currently registered with this provider.
      Returns:
      the team count; always >= 0

    • addMember

      boolean addMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole role)
      Adds the given player to the given team with the specified role.

      Implementations should reject the operation if the player is already a member of any team, or if the team has reached its maximum size. Firing TeamJoinEvent is left to the implementation.

      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player to add; must not be null
      role - the TeamRole to assign; must not be null and must not be TeamRole.OWNER (use createTeam(String, UUID) instead)
      Returns:
      true if the player was added successfully, false otherwise

    • removeMember

      boolean removeMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
      Removes the given player from the given team.

      Implementations should reject the operation if the player is the team owner; use deleteTeam(UUID) to disband a team. Firing TeamLeaveEvent is left to the implementation.

      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player to remove; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the player was a member and was removed, false otherwise

    • setMemberRole

      boolean setMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole newRole)
      Changes the role of an existing team member.

      Firing TeamRoleChangeEvent is left to the implementation.

      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player whose role should change; must not be null
      newRole - the new TeamRole to assign; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the role was changed, false if the player is not a member

    • getMemberRole

      Optional<TeamRole> getMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
      Returns the role of the given player within the given team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the player's TeamRole, or empty if the player is not a member of the team

    • getMemberInfo

      Optional<TeamMember> getMemberInfo(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
      Returns the TeamMember record for the given player within the given team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player; must not be null
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the TeamMember, or empty if the player is not a member

    • hasTeam

      boolean hasTeam(UUID playerUUID)
      Returns true if the given player belongs to any team.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the player has a team, false otherwise

    • teamExists

      boolean teamExists(String name)
      Returns true if a team with the given name currently exists.

      Implementations should perform a case-insensitive check where possible.

      Parameters:
      name - the name to check; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the team exists, false otherwise

    • isMember

      boolean isMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
      Returns true if the given player is a member (any role) of the given team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the UUID of the team; must not be null
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player; must not be null
      Returns:
      true if the player is a member, false otherwise
